checkout.confirmDesc: Please double-check the information below before proceeding to payment:
checkout.warningDesc: Booking information cannot be changed after payment has been processed. Please ensure that all passenger details match their official identity documents.
checkout.loginPromoText: Log in to receive offers and manage your bookings more easily.
checkout.passportHint: Passport number may contain letters and numbers.
checkout.citizenIdError: Citizen ID must be exactly 12 digits.
checkout.passportError: Passport must be 6-15 characters and contain only letters and numbers.
checkout.specialReqPlaceholder: Dietary requirements, allergies, stroller requested, etc...
checkout.goBackDesc: Please go back to the list and select a tour.

errors.fillAll: Please fill in all information for this passenger!
errors.fillContact: Please fill in all Contact Information!
errors.leadData: Please provide all required information for Passenger 1!
errors.invalidOrder: Invalid order, Booking info not found!
errors.loginRequired: Please log in to continue payment!
errors.serverFail: Failed to connect to the server.
errors.paymentCancelledHome: Payment was unsuccessful. Your booking has been saved in 'Pending Payment' status. You can go to 'My Bookings' to complete the payment.

checkout.minOrder: Minimum order must be {amount} to use this voucher
checkout.saleTourNoVoucher: This departure already has a sale price, so vouchers cannot be combined.
checkout.payosDesc: Quick QR-code scan with instant confirmation.
checkout.inStoreDesc: Hold seats for up to 24 hours. Please visit our office to pay.
